625 X1050A_INACTV_NO_EVNT_CD X1050A_INACTV_NO_EVNT_CD X1050A Reason for Inactivation: Event Did Not Occur Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the reason for inactivation of the prior erroneous record is because the event did not occur. 0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2023
626 X1050Z_INACTV_OTHR_CD X1050Z_INACTV_OTHR_CD X1050Z Reason for Inactivation: Other Error Requiring Inactivation Code CHAR 1 The data
